battleTraits.name: Masters of Destiny
battleTraits.description: At the start of Round 1, roll 9 Destiny Dice (D6). Store these values. You may replace any roll during the game with a Destiny Die result.

regimentAbilities.name: Bolt of Change
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18". Roll a die. On a 2+, inflict D3 mortal damage. For each model slain, return 1 slain model to a friendly unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Slashing Fins
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit with Fly. Move over an enemy unit. Roll a die for each model in that enemy unit. On a 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage.
